caption: A group of children stands outdoors against a backdrop of green foliage. In the foreground, a young boy wears a blue and red t-shirt with a graphic print, standing with his arms crossed. Beside him, another child is dressed in a pink hooded jacket and a brown plaid skirt. Other children stand behind them, including one in a yellow top and patterned blue and yellow skirt, and another in a light-colored shirt. Most of the children have their arms crossed or held close to their bodies, maintaining still and serious expressions. The scenery remains consistent across the sequence, with the children remaining in the same positions. There are no visible objects, equipment, logos, or on-screen text. The scene is a static shot with minimal movement, capturing the solemn demeanor of the children as they look toward the camera.
